heading: Experimental Playground
description: The Lab is a space for raw explorations, failed experiments, and serendipitous discoveries. This is where I test new algorithms and push the boundaries of creative technology.

items.title: Ethereal Logic Prototype
items.description: A study of recursive systems using randomized cellular grids.

items.title: Quantum Shaders v0.3
items.description: Dynamic math-driven color fields rendered strictly in GLSL shaders.

items.title: Noise Fields in 2D Space
items.description: Simulating complex flowing rivers using raw Simplex Noise formulas.

items.title: Procedural Botanical Matrix
items.description: Simulating L-Systems to generate computational tree and leaf patterns.

items.title: Digital Signal Deconstruction
items.description: Glighting sound streams in real-time onto an RGB pixel matrix.

items.title: Mathematical Geometry Study
items.description: A representation of organic patterns through strict crystalline rules.

items.title: City-wide Grid Processing
items.description: Generating visual abstract shapes mimicking London transport lines.

items.title: Automated Weaving Loom Mock
items.description: Programming traditional threads to respond to software logical states.
